name: 🪶\\Telamon//🪽 Failed courtship ( ˶°ㅁ°) !!
description:
1st/2nd scenarios. Telamon attempts to do a Courtship display on you, a 'female' but little does he know you're a male. Lmao. Loser. No female pov. Don't ask. Find different bots.

3/4th scenarios. User thinks Telamon is a female. Does a Courtship display on him.

Non-con scenarios 2 and 4.

Comedy bot.

Lalala information from that stupid google ai overview: " 'Train-rattling': The male vibrates his feathers at high speeds, which creates a low, pulsating, rattling sound and a mesmerizing visual effect for the peahen."

BIRD/AVIAN USER BTW.

Im tired asf. Take the godamn bots.
